item.title: ¥5,000 & a date? He is winning life.
item.description: FP Edit: I hope you’re seizing this Wednesday my dudes. Thank you for the upvotes! Literally the only time I ever cared. (I didn’t want to let them down when I saw this at 4 votes: https://i.imgur.com/uTb0tsb.jpeg) Staff working late lol :p
item.dc:creator: trashpandaDedsec

item.title: The internet, people, can be amazing sometimes!! Love this!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Wednesday WHOLESOME dump to help you with your mental health
item.description:
1. Such a nice guy
2
3. 10 million years evolutionary history of friendship between men summarized in 26 seconds (you know they were doin this shit in 300 000 B.C.)
4. ONE OF US
5. Awesome random interaction
6. We don't deserve these boys
8. Nom, nom nom
9. You are getting taken care of! Whether you like it or not :D
10. Brave girl
11. I am elephant
13. Meet the 26-year-old African spurred tortoise, Bon-Chan and his kind owner Mitani-san in Tsukishima.
14. I haven't implemented a puppy tax in a log time. Sorry gotta hit you with it today!
15. Today I wanted to share with you that I started reading this awesome book called Blood, Sweat & Pixels. It's about the history of various indie and mainstream games and the struggle of the devs to get them done. I have to say it's very inspiring and it helps me on my own journey as a game dev. To be honest, I've been working on the same game for almost 18 months now and it can get a bit frustrating. Imagine having to hold your focus on one thing for so long (while juggling everyday life). However this book inspired me and helped me re-start my passion. Anyway, if you want to support the game, a simple wishlist would mean the world to me. Please check it out on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Dont_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse_The_Game/ P.S. 1. This here is a plushie duck that I'm hoping a lot of players will develop affection for. P.S. 2HAVE A GREAT AND SUNNY WEEK, FRIENDOS!

item.title: From life in prison to a lawyer in the very court that sentenced him.
item.description: On September 27, 2017, Wright became the first and only person in the US history to have been sentenced to life in prison, securing his own release and exoneration, and then being granted a license to practice law by the very court that condemned him. He is best known for being falsely accused and convicted as a drug lord and sentenced to life in prison in 1991 facing 10 charges involving the sale of cocaine. His conviction was overturned in 1997 after litigation brought by him on the basis of police corruption during his investigation and the prosecutor’s knowing presentation of perjured testimony at his trial. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaac_Wright_Jr. #The_more_you_know
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: Deviousness Day 134
item.description:
Wanting to get out enough deviousness posts for my cake day so I make posting 69 posts in a year and hopefully will not anger the imgur gods. So I will be pushing out a bunch of posts. I will try to do the ping list and also it does take time and I has a lot going on irl. I am not getting rid of it in any way do not fret. Linkies to the discord and the steam group and bigger spiel with more info about it at the bottom of the post! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
ah fudge I posted dis yesterday and must have it downloaded multiple times. guess its here too now.
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork and on fridays do drawings based on word prompts given by members. I has a Deviousness discord server! We have a general area for memes and discussions of all different SFWish topics! We have gaming fun! I am really bad about running events and being consistent. I do randomly show up in vc and game. All are welcome who want to game or watch us game or just hang out feel free to hop into the vc. please do be respectful if we are in game let us chat for the game. We have an opt in kink area for dirtier conversations and then a role locked area for deeper kink discussions! (It is role locked because we take privacy and security very seriously and the discord is a place with real people sharing and things being shared is a privilege) Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
I love you *my* Daddy. Friendly reminder I am claimed so I would appreciate keeping that in mind when making comments towards me see dis: https://imgur.com/JipV5UR I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.
item.dc:creator: PotatoCheesMonk

item.title: My sweet Blair passed away
item.description: Some of you know and love (or at least tolerate) Blair; you’ve seen her playing on her playset or showing off her gorgeous chelicerae. Unfortunately, this morning I found he in a deathcurl behind her favorite perch. ? I think she became egg bound as she was fine the day before. I know most people will think it’s weird or stupid af to mourn the loss of a spider, but she was just as much a pet as any other animal. I already miss her sweet personality and adorable face so much FP Edit: Thank you for all the kind words, condolences, and stories about how Blair and my other spiders have helped you with arachnophobia; it truly means a lot to me <3
item.dc:creator: stonedlikeicheckedoutmedusa

item.title: Jenna Ortega for the WIN
item.description: As a full time writer, I’ve been saying this for a decade (and oddly, I was told this was a “controversial” statement until about 5 years ago) But I think it’s just common sense. More *original* female characters. Full stop. Love Jenna Ortega! So excited to see “Beetlejuice, Beetlejuice”! ??

item.title: Little sister looking out for her new big brother
item.description:
Harley has been with us for several years and she was very eager to play and learn right from the beginning. We taught her several commands and introduced the buttons on a whim to see how she would react. Not surprisingly, she learned how to press all the buttons around the house pretty quickly. Last year my husband and I “fail fostered” an older dog named Evy, who took some time warming up to us. Harley, who is used to being an only child/pampered princess, has had to adjust to sharing attention and toys and treats (the horror!) with Evy. She is VERY sweet with other dogs, but can be quite cuddly and energetic. Evy is laid back and a bit of a loner, so we figured it might take some time for them to adjust to each other. Turns out, Harley has started looking out for Evy ever since she realized he isn’t yet sure how to use the buttons. She will hit the “outside” button to get our attention, we will take them both out, and Harley will wait patiently while Evy does his thing before heading back inside. I thought it was a fluke at first, but she has done it several times now and I just thought it was the sweetest thing! Now, Evy is opening up more to us with things like asking for cuddles and scritches, and Harley is making sure he knows she’s got his back. Wanted to share something light and cute with the Imgur community since sometimes things can get a little bleak around here. Here’s some pictures of my big ol furbutts as a dog tax:
Harley, the button presser
Evy, our handsome guy who is still learning. He may not have it just yet but he’s trying his best!
The two goofs getting some well deserved belly scratches together.
item.dc:creator: harleybarley120

item.title: I'm probably making this for supper tonight

item.title: Some more adventures in making better food
item.description:
Hello imgurian, come with me won't you as I show you some of the dishes I've made recently in my quest to get better at making visually appealing food (that's also tasty). First up, this is beef chow fun (shoutout to the Wok cookbook by Kenji Lopez-Alt).
Action shot of me eating that chow fun while being judged by Olive.
I treated zucchini like a main protein, seared it really well after I cross-hatched the flesh. This got served with some simply dressed angel hair in a garlic butter sauce with a few garden tomatoes.
Grilled duck breast with a chimichurri sauce. Accompanied by smoked cherries, grilled asparagus & rye bread, and a little microgreens salad.
Simple grilled chicken thigh on a summer salad of corn, zucchini, baby kale.
Zucchini/lemon pizza for summertime.
Birria style tacos
Chili colorado served with Mexican rice and white beans.
My wife usually just wants to eat this in the summer. I shave zucchini into thin ribbons with my mandolin and quickly grill them. That gets tossed with lemon/basil/almonds.
A sandwich I made with some leftover grilled duck breast sliced thin.
Cascatelli pasta in a creamy feta/tomato sauce.
We eat a lot of meals like this. Caviar black lentils, rice, avocado.
A couple pizzas (made in the Lloyd long-pan). Pepperoni on the left, nduja on the right.
Oh hey, another shot of that nduja pizza!
Grilled hangar steak & shrimps. Pickled cucumber and red onion salad.
A simple teriyaki glazed grilled chicken breast with some miso butter tossed veg and rice.
A nice quick sear rare tuna steak with a watermelon and cucumber salad.
Some more simple grilled chicken & zucchini, and a corn puree.
Griddled peaches and corn fritters with some crispy prosciutto.
Simple pan seared salmon and a caesar salad variation with corn and panko.
I don't really fry things a whole lot, because I hate the cleanup. But I decided I was going to make a proper chicken sandwich. This is on some mini focaccia that I made myself.
I'm missing some key components of a proper fry-up, but this still hit the spot.
Grilled swordfish steak, salad of fennel and apple with pine nuts.
The makings of a salsa to pair with pork.
Smoked pork belly tacos with the aforementioned salsa (actually two different salsas here).
Quick stirfry with bean sprouts, mushrooms, onion and scallion.
Ginger shrimp stirfry with bean sprouts and scallions.
Another nice pan seared salmon, baby kale salad with strawberries and almonds.
Special birthday dinner. Beautiful ribeye with some pickled ramps on top. Wine braised mushrooms on the side.
Charcuterie style meal. Provolone steak griddled in the cast iron, some butter sauteed peaches, salumi, and pan de cristal I made myself.
Griddled cheese, zucchini & corn tacos
Tacos with pork sausage, zucchini, corn, salsa.
Poke bowl with some cured tuna, pickled ramps, cucumber, avocado.
Grilled duck breast, baby kale salad with blackberries & fried shallots.
A different zucchini/lemon pizza.
Two more pizzas from the Lloyd long pans. Pepperoni/arugula, and pecan.
Poke bowl, this time featuring smoked salmon, macadamias, cucumbers, avocado, fried shallots.
Indonesian style noodle bowl. Rice noodles at the base, some fish sauce grilled chicken, fried shallots, zucchini & corn, cucumber, herbs.
Stirfried pea shoots are the star of this, but to eat with them there's some rice, chicken, fried shallot.
Cabbage and peanut soup with chicken meatballs.
Chicken korma. I've got a ways to go on my korma making, but I have gotten better from when I started.
Grilled pork steak, peaches, zucchini, and some cast iron cornbread.
Griddled provolone steak, salad of peach, cucumber.
Hey, another salmon! I like salmon.
Miso butter roasted corn/cabbage/asparagus with rice.
Zucchini fritter fryup with eggs and avocado.
Another simple grilled dinner.
Ceci beans with manchego, cucumber, basil, lemon. With some grilled chicken.
The setup for making pad kaprao (plus a simpler stirfry for mrs forsteri)
Finished product pad kaprao (basil chicken)
Dog tax. Olive in her bunny onesie and mrs forsteri. Hey, thanks for coming along for the ride! This is now my fifth food post. Here are the first four. https://imgur.com/gallery/adventures-making-better-food-Pun4Dpt https://imgur.com/gallery/more-adventures-making-better-food-KrCxRV4 https://imgur.com/gallery/even-more-adventures-making-better-food-dgSGSI3 https://imgur.com/gallery/yet-more-adventures-making-better-food-erUJU9V
item.dc:creator: forsteri80

item.title: DRAGONCON COSPLAY DUMP 2024
item.description:
Dragoncon 2024 was great! I’m a little more alive now and ready to post my spoils in picture form. We are starting with some offerings from one of our Thursday night parties; the bunny hutch. I give you grinch bunny
Idk what they are but they are fabulous
Biblically accurate googly eyes
High priests, spreading the good word of fedex Jon. Under his googely eyes
Some new groove. They gave me my first ribbon of con this year.
Wendy’s will fight you
Clothing optional sims
Courage the cowardly dog
Azula
Howls moving castle
Edit: the comments let me know that I have a shit memory and this is the rocketeer
Titty Gandalf
We love inflatables!
FSM
BEETLEJUICE
Love me some gritty
Idk if this is supposed to be a specific character but I’m down
Same as above
Unnamed by me characters continue
Just a beautiful casual cosplay
Recess
Heathers
Deadpool dance party. There honestly weren’t as many Deadpool’s as I was expecting. Only slightly more than usual. I thought we would be overrun.
More of the dancing deadpools
It’s all of our birthday
Carpet dress
Idk but dope as hell
Popinpool
Outlander
Zoom zoom zoom
Anne rice hates everyone.
Only mostly dead
Monster high
John and yoko
No, no, no, no, no way!
You bitch!
Roccoconess
Ursula
Fantasy high
And many a ray gun

If you get thrown into a rage by people in consensual relationships you need to ask yourself why.
Hell yeah
mood
Every long haired cat I have had has been a ball of chaos.
If a man wearing Nazi Regalia can feel comfortable being in the Republican party, and Republicans can feel comfortable with Nazis, you have to start asking questions.
Do Addison Rae's critics believe that Hong Xiuquan is the son of God and Brother of Jesus Christ?
owo
No.
mood
Yeah fuck you, Logitech. Subscription based models can go to hell and roast forever. Especially with the fact Windows 12 is rumored to be Subscription based.
O- O
Micù Thatsùghnaidh.
:(
O_O

Wait, how big is sonic?
omg crocs go pop?
if I was a preacher I would just swear like this.

Basically Malta. It's also why Maltese looks weird.

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Apparently ghost posting is legal in Florida
item.description: So apparently the lease on the building went up 10k a month so without telling me they showed up and started gutting the building. Anyone that wants their vacation pay has to stay and gut the building for parts. They had me interviewing people all last week and I drug tested 10 people and offered them positions, was wondering why it was taking backgrounds so long, they never planned on hiring anyone, and those type of ghost listings are apparently perfectly legal in Florida. I called my old Dm and got most my employees interviews but still - what a day
item.dc:creator: TheRogerMac

item.title: Not another brick in the wall
item.description: The artist: https://www.instagram.com/firanbricks
item.dc:creator: Fulustreka

item.title: I'm hesitantly letting myself get hopeful for this.
item.description: The tech market has been absolute hell and I lost my job right before the job market hit a terrible point where all the big companies laid off thousands of engineers. I've applied for over a thousand positions, have had dozens of interviews, but no offers yet. In June I made it the final interview with a company that seemed perfect. Amazing benefits, good pay, but most importantly they do good. Their work has a tangible effect helping people, (something that I've missed since having to leave my old life at the animal shelter) and I loved the people I met and talked to through the process. However, like every other company that I interviewed for that didn't ghost me after the first round they said they really liked me and I should keep an eye on their job postings for future openings, but they ultimately went with a more experienced candidate. I have 3 years in the field and the market is full of senior engineers who have double that or more. I had heard it before so I didn't really believe it, but they contacted me today! Just this weekend I was telling my wife I may have to go back to the animal shelter for a while because unemployment insurance runs out in a few weeks. It's not a straight up job offer, the recruiter said they wanted to schedule a meeting with me and the management team I already met so we can go over the details of the position, and I don't know what comes next after that, but I'm actually feeling some hope.
item.dc:creator: Necridos

item.title: Internet has ruined me
item.dc:creator: Nousentre

item.title: Thanks, Imgur
item.description:
Another year around the sun, another milestone. Last night, tiny octopus asked for help in deciding what kind of cake to make for his birthday today. A lot of you chimed in, and among the numerous amazing suggestions, the consensus seemed to be to make both. So we did. Above is the cake decorated and below you can see the crumb and interior look. A sort of marbled Funfetti and Devils Food with chocolate fudge icing exterior and cream cheese interior.
The cake is small; we only used 1/3 of each cake mix. There's only the three of us here after all. I got myself a two burner cast iron griddle, and I am playing the new WoW expansion. As a newly single guy, it's tiny octopus' birthday, he'll celebrate it as he likes. Love to most of you, a fond wish for better days and glorious nights to all of you.
Cat tax: a slightly miffed Chessie, who doesn't understand why she can't have cake.
item.dc:creator: TinyOctopus
